# Production release

> Production deployment and migrations are never automatic. This template prepares a human-controlled release only.

## Release manifest

- Version, commit, included PRs, artifact digest:
- Staging evidence:
- Security / DevOps / Release Manager sign-offs:
- Human decision authority and change window:

## Go/no-go

- [ ] All required checks pass on the exact artifact
- [ ] Known risks and customer impact accepted
- [ ] Secrets/config managed outside the repository
- [ ] Migration compatibility, backups, monitoring, communications, and rollback are ready
- Decision and timestamp:

## Human-controlled execution record

- Merge/deploy/migration operators:
- Health and business signals:
- Incident threshold:
- Final outcome:

## Rollback

- Last known-good artifact, data compatibility, triggers, authority, communications, and verification:
